SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 08

JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. JUDGMENT DOES NOT AFFECT JODY KINNEY. MS. KINNEY IS OUT OF THE COUNTRY AND COULD NOT BE SERVED. DEFENDANTS, STAR WILKINSON, MIDNIGHT WILKINSON AND ALMA PERRY WILL MOVE FROM 822 CLAYTON STREET, #L, SAN FRANCISCO BY 5PM, 1-15-95. IF DEFENDANTS HAVE MOVED BY THAT DATE AND TIME, PLAINTIFFS PRISCILLA ANN TAYLOR AND JOHN HOSACK WILL WAIVE BACK RENT, COSTS AND DAMAGES. THIS CASE WILL THEN BE DISMISSED. IF DEFENDANTS DO NOT MOVE BY 1-15-95, 5PM, PLAINTIFFS WILL BE AWARDED BACK RENT PLUS TWO, ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS. PLAINTIFFS WILL ALSO BE ENTITLED TO POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AT 822 CLAYTON STREET, #L, SAN FRANCISCO. JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION AND DAMAGES WILL BE ENTERED JOINTLY AND INDIVIDUALLY. ALL PARTIES STIPULATE THAT THE JUDGMENT WILL BE VACATED 1-16-95, 5PM IF THE DEFENDANTS HAVE LEFT THE PREMISES BY 1-15-95, 5PM.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
